lines.speaker: Look-out
lines.text: This path leads to the Doors of Dinh. You should be careful if you wish to travel any further.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Doors of Dinh.

lines.speaker: Look-out
lines.text: They're to keep the Wintertodt at bay. No-one knows what it really is, but centuries ago it came out of the northern wastes to terrorise the kingdom.

lines.speaker: Look-out
lines.text: The Doors were created by Dinh, a master smither, to imprison the Wintertodt.

lines.speaker: Look-out
lines.text: Now we keep a watch on the pass, so that the armies can be summoned if the Wintertodt ever escapes.

lines.speaker: Look-out
lines.text: I'm the duty look-out on the northern pass. It's the worst assignment there is.

lines.speaker: Look-out
lines.text: As if the cold weren't bad enough, the snooty Arceuus magi always look down their noses at the Shayzien armies, just because we use muscle and steel rather than fancy magicks.
